backup.note: No run may be marked reviewed/approved, declared complete, or deleted from this machine until confirmed=true with a verified second copy outside the public repository.

runs.sessionConditions: fresh session; first response; no regeneration; no suggestion clicks
runs.exposureClassification: post-publication observation | potentially exposed | exposure status unknown

derivatives._comment: Every redaction/annotation/normalization is a separate file; raw is never edited.

statusVocabulary.rule: Only explicit founder instruction may set reviewStatus=approved. Approval is never inferred from silence or from scoring completion.
